metadata.description: NEB reaction-barrier calculations on organic molecules with native ORCA and the Transition1x dataset.

plugins.name: nebskill
plugins.description: Nudged Elastic Band reaction-barrier calculations on organic molecules using the Transition1x dataset, powered by native ORCA (Opt / NEB-CI / NEB-TS / OptTS / Freq / IRC / GOAT at wB97X/6-31G(d)). Requires uv; Python dependencies installed automatically. Cluster jobs run via a companion HPC agent plugin (Rikyu/Hokusai).
